MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Paul Boling plaintiff in propria persona, Telephonic appearance, call initiated by Court.
Herman Franck defendant in propria persona, Telephonic appearance

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses to interrogatories, request for production of documents, and request for admissions is denied as untimely pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Sections 2030.300(c), 2031.310(c), and 2033.290(c) and for failure to submit a separate statement of matters in dispute pursuant to California Rule of Court 335. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY/RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY

MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to requests for admission, interrogatories, and request for production of documents is ordered off calendar. There is no proof that the motion was served pursuant to CCP 1005. In addition, the motion does not comply with California Rule of Court 312 et seq. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
